questions.text: The Goods issue date is the proposed date which the customer should receive delivery of the goods
Transportation planning date is calculated based on:
options: Requested delivery date, goods issue date, transit time, loading time and route
Loading date and transportation planning time
Pick pack time, loading and transit time, and requested delivery date
Shipping point, route and loading group

questions.text: The Unloading Point represents the set of days in the week and the time slot when the goods can be received (assigned to a factory calendar)
Pick Pack Lead Time can be:
The system uses the transportation lead time to calculate the transportation planning date
